Crumpled wrapping paper mountains covering the carpet, empty boxes tipped over, scotch tape stuck to couch cushions.
Christmas tree lit with giant multicolored bulbs, silver tinsel draped heavy, presents stacked underneath on tree skirt.
Bubble lights glowing orange on tree branches, glass ball ornaments reflecting rainbow colors, silver icicles hanging down.
Gold foil star crooked on top of tree, popcorn garland wrapped around branches, ceramic angel ornament front center.
Sears Wishbook opened to toy section, red pen circles around action figures, dog-eared corners marking pages.
JCPenney catalog spread across kitchen table, multiple items circled, worn spine from repeated browsing through toy pages.
Unwrapped Atari game cartridge sitting by tree, crumpled bow, instruction manual pages spread open on carpet.
Ribbon curls scattered across hardwood floor, empty shirt box, styrofoam packing peanuts spilling out near tree base.
Red felt stockings bulging on brick fireplace mantel, candy cane tops visible, tangerine toe poking through opening.
Jack-o-lantern glowing on wooden porch steps, fake cotton cobwebs stretched across railing, orange string lights overhead.
Plastic pillowcase dumped out, candy bars spread across linoleum floor, miniature chocolates sorted into separate piles.
Orange plastic pumpkin bucket overflowing with wrapped candies, Smarties rolls, Tootsie Rolls, and fun-size Snickers bars.
Sparklers stuck in glass mason jar on picnic table, red and blue paper plates stacked, watermelon rinds nearby.
Plaid blanket spread on lawn facing dark sky, empty folding chairs, sparkler wires smoking on concrete.
Wicker Easter basket lined with pink plastic grass, foil-wrapped chocolate bunny, pastel dyed eggs nestled together.
Dining table set with orange taper candles, construction paper turkey centerpiece, green bean casserole in Pyrex dish.
Shoebox covered in red paper, valentine card slot cut on top, cartoon character valentines scattered around base.
Sheet cake with rainbow frosting roses, numbered candles melting wax, colorful paper cone hats on empty chairs.
Wooden sled leaning against porch post, snow boots dripping on doormat, steaming cocoa mug on kitchen counter.
Advent calendar hanging on wall, chocolate compartments opened, December dates counting down in glittery numbers toward Christmas.
Nativity scene arranged on TV console, plastic wise men and camels, ceramic manger with hay under tree.
Christmas morning aftermath, bike with red bow leaning against wall, torn wrapping paper trails leading everywhere.
Aluminum tree rotating on color wheel base, red yellow blue green lights washing over metallic silver branches.
Glass icicle ornaments dangling from branches, vintage Shiny Brite balls clustered together, tarnished silver garland draped thick.
Cardboard fireplace built around television, red construction paper flames, stockings taped across fake brick printed front.
Hickory Farms gift basket unwrapped, summer sausage and cheese spreads visible, wicker basket sitting near tree.
Halloween jack-o-lantern starting to collapse, candle wax pooled inside, triangular eyes flickering with flame light inside darkness.
Trick-or-treat candy sorted by type, chocolate pile separate from hard candies, wrappers creating colorful carpet pattern.
Black plastic cauldron tipped over, candy spilling across tile floor, fun-size candy bars rolling toward baseboards.
Backyard picnic table covered with red checkered cloth, sparkler box opened, empty soda cans from July celebration.
Firework debris scattered on driveway, spent bottle rockets, burnt punk sticks, cardboard tubes from Roman candles.
Easter egg dye cups on newspaper, vinegar smell lingering, crayon wax sticks, eggs drying on paper towels.
Turkey-shaped salt and pepper shakers on sideboard, mashed potato bowl with serving spoon, pumpkin pie cooling nearby.
Classroom desk covered with valentine cards, heart-shaped lollipops, tiny conversation hearts spilling from torn envelopes.
Birthday streamers taped to ceiling corners, drooping crepe paper, half-eaten sheet cake, plastic forks on paper plates.
Snow pants hanging on coat hooks, mittens drying on radiator, icy slush melting into puddle by door.
Popcorn tin opened showing three flavors, cheese butter caramel sections, Christmas gift tin with winter scene outside.
Light-up ceramic Christmas village on mantel, tiny houses glowing from within, cotton batting snow around miniature buildings.
Tree skirt buried under discarded bows and tags, scissors lying open, empty battery packages from new toys.
Icicle lights hanging crooked from roof gutter, extension cord snaking through snow to outdoor outlet on house.
Halloween costume pieces scattered on bedroom floor, plastic mask with elastic string, synthetic cape draped over chair.
Candy corn bowl on coffee table, orange yellow white kernels, October decorations surrounding the ceramic harvest dish.
Firecracker package partially empty on lawn, punk stick smoldering in glass, ash marks on concrete driveway.
Egg hunt basket abandoned on grass, plastic eggs cracked open, foil chocolate wrappers glinting in spring sunlight.
Thanksgiving leftovers in Tupperware containers, aluminum foil covering dishes, cranberry sauce can-shaped in glass bowl.
Valentine shoebox decorated with doilies and stickers, construction paper hearts glued on, slot overflowing with cards.
Party favor bags lined up on counter, tissue paper poking out, plastic toys and candy visible inside.
Window frost patterns on glass, mittens steaming on heating vent, hot chocolate powder canister on kitchen counter.
Menorah with colored candles on windowsill, wax drippings frozen on brass holders, spinning dreidel nearby on sill.
New Year's Eve party blowers on carpet, confetti scattered everywhere, paper crown crumpled near empty punch bowl.
